overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny suburban Los Angeles-style neighborhood with palm trees, crossing intersections, and passing other pedestrians and vehicles. The clip transitions from a residential sidewalk to an intersection with a view of the downtown skyline, then continues along another sidewalk before crossing a second intersection.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a suburban sidewalk shaded by palm trees, passing a pedestrian in a green top. A blue sports car drives by on the adjacent road as the character approaches an intersection.

segments.scene_description: The character steps into the crosswalk, transitioning from the enclosed suburban street to an open intersection with a clear view of the downtown skyline. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the character crosses the asphalt.

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character continues along a sidewalk lined with palm trees and utility poles, passing a parked white van and a billboard. Another pedestrian in tan clothing walks ahead in the same direction.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches another intersection and waits at the crosswalk as a black sedan passes through. After the vehicle clears, the character crosses the street alongside another pedestrian in tan clothing, following the crosswalk lines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny suburban neighborhood that transitions from shaded residential sidewalks to open city intersections. It begins with the character walking along a palm-shaded sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in green as a blue sports car drives by. As the character steps into the crosswalk, the enclosed street opens up into a wide intersection that reveals a clear view of the distant downtown skyline. The scene then shifts back to a sidewalk lined with utility poles and palm trees, passing a parked white van and a billboard while following a pedestrian in tan clothing. Finally, the camera moves toward a second intersection, pausing for a black sedan before crossing the asphalt alongside another pedestrian.
